# Signal Thresholds

## Early signal

```text
CTR above baseline
landing engagement above baseline
qualitative comments show problem recognition
```

## Mid signal

```text
signup rate improves
demo completion improves
qualified lead rate improves
```

## Strong signal

```text
activation improves
paid conversion improves
CAC and payback viable
incrementality evidence exists
```

## Scale signal

```text
marginal CPA/ROAS remains acceptable as spend rises
```
